metadata.significance: Called 'Heart of the Quran', focuses on resurrection and afterlife

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ يسٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Yaseen

translations.en_sahih: Ya, Seen.
translations.en_yusufali: Ya Sin.
translations.ms_basmeih: Yaa, Siin.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waalqurani alhakeemi

translations.en_sahih: By the wise Qur'an.
translations.en_yusufali: By the Qur'an, full of Wisdom,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi Al-Quran yang mengandungi hikmat-hikmat dan kebenaran yang tetap kukuh,

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Innaka lamina almursaleena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed you, [O Muhammad], are from among the messengers,
translations.en_yusufali: Thou art indeed one of the messengers,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya engkau (wahai Muhammad adalah seorang Rasul) dari Rasul-rasul yang telah diutus,

ayahs.arabic: عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: AAala siratin mustaqeemin

translations.en_sahih: On a straight path.
translations.en_yusufali: On a Straight Way.
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang tetap di atas jalan yang lurus (ugama Islam).

ayahs.arabic: تَنزِيلَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Tanzeela alAAazeezi alrraheemi

translations.en_sahih: [This is] a revelation of the Exalted in Might, the Merciful,
translations.en_yusufali: It is a Revelation sent down by (Him), the Exalted in Might, Most Merciful.
translations.ms_basmeih: Al-Quran itu, diturunkan oleh Allah Yang Maha Kuasa, lagi Maha Mengasihani,

ayahs.arabic: لِتُنذِرَ قَوْمًا مَّآ أُنذِرَ ءَابَآؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غَـٰفِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Litunthira qawman ma onthira abaohum fahum ghafiloona

translations.en_sahih: That you may warn a people whose forefathers were not warned, so they are unaware.
translations.en_yusufali: In order that thou mayest admonish a people, whose fathers had received no admonition, and who therefore remain heedless (of the Signs of Allah).
translations.ms_basmeih: Supaya engkau memberi peringatan dan amaran kepada kaum yang datuk neneknya telah lama tidak diberikan peringatan dan amaran; sebab itulah mereka lalai.

ayahs.arabic: لَقَدْ حَقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَىٰٓ أَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad haqqa alqawlu AAala aktharihim fahum la yuminoona

translations.en_sahih: Already the word has come into effect upon most of them, so they do not believe.
translations.en_yusufali: The Word is proved true against the greater part of them: for they do not believe.
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi sesungguhnya, telah tetap hukuman seksa atas kebanyakan mereka, kerana mereka tidak mahu beriman.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِىٓ أَعْنَـٰقِهِمْ أَغْلَـٰلًا فَهِىَ إِلَى ٱلْأَذْقَانِ فَهُم مُّقْمَحُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna jaAAalna fee aAAnaqihim aghlalan fahiya ila alathqani fahum muqmahoona

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We have put shackles on their necks, and they are to their chins, so they are with heads [kept] aloft.
translations.en_yusufali: We have put yokes round their necks right up to their chins, so that their heads are forced up (and they cannot see).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami jadikan (kesombongan dan keengganan mereka tunduk kepada kebenaran sebagai) belenggu yang memberkas kedua tangan mereka ke batang leher mereka; (lebarnya belenggu itu) sampai (menongkatkan) dagu mereka lalu menjadilah mereka terdongak.

ayahs.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا مِنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ سَدًّا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنَـٰهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: WajaAAalna min bayni aydeehim saddan wamin khalfihim saddan faaghshaynahum fahum la yubsiroona

translations.en_sahih: And We have put before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them, so they do not see.
translations.en_yusufali: And We have put a bar in front of them and a bar behind them, and further, We have covered them up; so that they cannot see.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami jadikan (sifat tamak dan gila mereka kepada harta benda dan pangkat itu sebagai) sekatan (yang menghalang mereka daripada memandang kepada keburukan dan kesingkatan masa dunia yang ada) di hadapan mereka, dan sekatan (yang menghalang mereka daripada memikirkan azab yang ada) di belakang mereka (pada hari kiamat). lalu Kami tutup pandangan mereka; maka dengan itu, mereka tidak dapat melihat (jalan yang benar).

ayahs.arabic: وَسَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wasawaon AAalayhim aanthartahum am lam tunthirhum la yuminoona

translations.en_sahih: And it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them - they will not believe.
translations.en_yusufali: The same is it to them whether thou admonish them or thou do not admonish them: they will not believe.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (dengan sebab itu) sama sahaja kepada mereka, engkau beri amaran atau engkau tidak beri amaran kepadanya - mereka tidak akan beriman.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَخَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ ۖ فَبَشِّرْهُ بِمَغْفِرَةٍ وَأَجْرٍ كَرِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Innama tunthiru mani ittabaAAa alththikra wakhashiya alrrahmana bialghaybi fabashshirhu bimaghfiratin waajrin kareemin

translations.en_sahih: You can only warn one who follows the message and fears the Most Merciful unseen. So give him good tidings of forgiveness and noble reward.
translations.en_yusufali: Thou canst but admonish such a one as follows the Message and fears the (Lord) Most Gracious, unseen: give such a one, therefore, good tidings, of Forgiveness and a Reward most generous.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya peringatan dan amaran (yang berkesan dan mendatangkan faedah) hanyalah yang engkau berikan kepada orang yang sedia menurut ajaran Al-Quran serta ia takut (melanggar perintah Allah) Ar-Rahman semasa ia tidak dilihat orang dan semasa ia tidak melihat azab Tuhan. Oleh itu berilah kepadanya berita yang mengembirakan dengan keampunan dan pahala yang mulia.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَنَكْتُبُ مَا قَدَّمُوا۟ وَءَاثَـٰرَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلَّ شَىْءٍ أَحْصَيْنَـٰهُ فِىٓ إِمَامٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna nahnu nuhyee almawta wanaktubu ma qaddamoo waatharahum wakulla shayin ahsaynahu fee imamin mubeenin

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, it is We who bring the dead to life and record what they have put forth and what they left behind, and all things We have enumerated in a clear register.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily We shall give life to the dead, and We record that which they send before and that which they leave behind, and of all things have We taken account in a clear Book (of evidence).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami menghidupkan orang-orang yang mati, dan Kami tuliskan segala yang mereka telah kerjakan serta segala kesan perkataan dan perbuatan yang mereka tinggalkan. Dan (ingatlah) tiap-tiap sesuatu kami catitkan satu persatu dalam Kitab (ibu Suratan) yang jelas nyata.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱضْرِبْ لَهُم مَّثَلًا أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْقَرْيَةِ إِذْ جَآءَهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waidrib lahum mathalan ashaba alqaryati ith jaaha almursaloona

translations.en_sahih: And present to them an example: the people of the city, when the messengers came to it -
translations.en_yusufali: Set forth to them, by way of a parable, the (story of) the Companions of the City. Behold!, there came messengers to it.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan ceritakanlah kepada mereka satu keadaan yang ajaib mengenai kisah penduduk sebuah bandar (yang tertentu) iaitu ketika mereka didatangi Rasul-rasul (Kami),

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهِمُ ٱثْنَيْنِ فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَعَزَّزْنَا بِثَالِثٍ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُم مُّرْسَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith arsalna ilayhimu ithnayni fakaththaboohuma faAAazzazna bithalithin faqaloo inna ilaykum mursaloona

translations.en_sahih: When We sent to them two but they denied them, so We strengthened them with a third, and they said, "Indeed, we are messengers to you."
translations.en_yusufali: When We (first) sent to them two messengers, they rejected them: But We strengthened them with a third: they said, "Truly, we have been sent on a mission to you."
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika Kami mengutus kepada mereka dua orang Rasul lalu mereka mendustakannya; kemudian Kami kuatkan (kedua Rasul itu) dengan Rasul yang ketiga, lalu Rasul-rasul itu berkata: ` Sesungguhnya kami ini adalah diutuskan kepada kamu '.

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ مِن شَىْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا تَكْذِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo ma antum illa basharun mithluna wama anzala alrrahmanu min shayin in antum illa takthiboona

translations.en_sahih: They said, "You are not but human beings like us, and the Most Merciful has not revealed a thing. You are only telling lies."
translations.en_yusufali: The (people) said: "Ye are only men like ourselves; and (Allah) Most Gracious sends no sort of revelation: ye do nothing but lie."
translations.ms_basmeih: Penduduk bandar itu menjawab: "Kamu ini tidak lain hanyalah manusia seperti kami juga, dan Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah tidak menurunkan sesuatupun (tentang ugama yang kamu dakwakan); Kamu ini tidak lain hanyalah berdusta".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ رَبُّنَا يَعْلَمُ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo rabbuna yaAAlamu inna ilaykum lamursaloona

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Our Lord knows that we are messengers to you,
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "Our Lord doth know that we have been sent on a mission to you:
translations.ms_basmeih: Rasul-rasul berkata: Tuhan Kami mengetahui bahawa sesungguhnya Kami adalah Rasul-rasul yang diutus kepada kamu,

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا عَلَيْنَآ إِلَّا ٱلْبَلَـٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama AAalayna illa albalaghu almubeenu

translations.en_sahih: And we are not responsible except for clear notification."
translations.en_yusufali: "And our duty is only to proclaim the clear Message."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan tugas Kami hanyalah menyampaikan perintah-perintahNya dengan cara yang jelas nyata".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا تَطَيَّرْنَا بِكُمْ ۖ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهُوا۟ لَنَرْجُمَنَّكُمْ وَلَيَمَسَّنَّكُم مِّنَّا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo inna tatayyarna bikum lain lam tantahoo lanarjumannakum walayamassannakum minna AAathabun aleemun

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Indeed, we consider you a bad omen. If you do not desist, we will surely stone you, and there will surely touch you, from us, a painful punishment."
translations.en_yusufali: The (people) said: "for us, we augur an evil omen from you: if ye desist not, we will certainly stone you. And a grievous punishment indeed will be inflicted on you by us."
translations.ms_basmeih: Penduduk bandar itu berkata pula: "Sesungguhnya kami merasa nahas dan malang dengan sebab kamu. Demi sesungguhnya, kalau kamu tidak berhenti (dari menjalankan tugas yang kamu katakan itu), tentulah kami akan merejam kamu dan sudah tentu kamu akan merasai dari pihak kami azab seksa yang tidak terperi sakitnya".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ طَـٰٓئِرُكُم مَّعَكُمْ ۚ أَئِن ذُكِّرْتُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ مُّسْرِفُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo tairukum maAAakum ain thukkirtum bal antum qawmun musrifoona

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Your omen is with yourselves. Is it because you were reminded? Rather, you are a transgressing people."
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "Your evil omens are with yourselves: (deem ye this an evil omen). If ye are admonished? Nay, but ye are a people transgressing all bounds!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Rasul-rasul itu menjawab: "Nahas dan malang kamu itu adalah disebabkan (kekufuran) yang ada pada kamu. Patutkah kerana kamu diberi peringatan dan nasihat pengajaran (maka kamu mengancam kami dengan apa yang kamu katakan itu)? (Kamu bukanlah orang-orang yang mahu insaf) bahkan kamu adalah kaum pelampau".

ayahs.arabic: وَجَآءَ مِنْ أَقْصَا ٱلْمَدِينَةِ رَجُلٌ يَسْعَىٰ قَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wajaa min aqsa almadeenati rajulun yasAAa qala ya qawmi ittabiAAoo almursaleena

translations.en_sahih: And there came from the farthest end of the city a man, running. He said, "O my people, follow the messengers.
translations.en_yusufali: Then there came running, from the farthest part of the City, a man, saying, "O my people! Obey the messengers:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (semasa Rasul-rasul itu diancam), datanglah seorang lelaki dari hujung bandar itu dengan berlari, lalu memberi nasihat dengan katanya:" Wahai kaumku! Turutlah Rasul-rasul itu -

ayahs.arabic: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَن لَّا يَسْـَٔلُكُمْ أَجْرًا وَهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: IttabiAAoo man la yasalukum ajran wahum muhtadoona

translations.en_sahih: Follow those who do not ask of you [any] payment, and they are [rightly] guided.
translations.en_yusufali: "Obey those who ask no reward of you (for themselves), and who have themselves received Guidance.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Turutlah orang-orang yang tidak meminta kapada kamu sesuatu balasan, sedang mereka adalah orang-orang mandapat hidayah petunjuk".

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا لِىَ لَآ أَعْبُدُ ٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنِى وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama liya la aAAbudu allathee fataranee wailayhi turjaAAoona

translations.en_sahih: And why should I not worship He who created me and to whom you will be returned?
translations.en_yusufali: "It would not be reasonable in me if I did not serve Him Who created me, and to Whom ye shall (all) be brought back.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (apabila ditanya: Sudahkah engkau menerima ugama mereka? Maka jawabnya): "Mengapa aku tidak menyembah Tuhan yang menciptakan daku, dan yang kepadaNyalah (aku dan) kamu semua akan dikembalikan?

ayahs.arabic: ءَأَتَّخِذُ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةً إِن يُرِدْنِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ بِضُرٍّ لَّا تُغْنِ عَنِّى شَفَـٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُنقِذُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Aattakhithu min doonihi alihatan in yuridni alrrahmanu bidurrin la tughni AAannee shafaAAatuhum shayan wala yunqithooni

translations.en_sahih: Should I take other than Him [false] deities [while], if the Most Merciful intends for me some adversity, their intercession will not avail me at all, nor can they save me?
translations.en_yusufali: "Shall I take (other) gods besides Him? If (Allah) Most Gracious should intend some adversity for me, of no use whatever will be their intercession for me, nor can they deliver me.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Patutkah aku menyembah beberapa tuhan yang lain dari Allah? (Sudah tentu tidak patut, kerana) jika Allah yang Maha Pemurah hendak menimpakan daku dengan sesuatu bahaya, mereka tidak dapat memberikan sebarang syafaat kepadaku, dan mereka juga tidak dapat menyelamatkan daku.

ayahs.arabic: إِنِّىٓ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Innee ithan lafee dalalin mubeenin

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, I would then be in manifest error.
translations.en_yusufali: "I would indeed, if I were to do so, be in manifest Error.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya aku (kalau melakukan syirik) tentulah aku pada ketika itu berada dalam kesesatan yang nyata.

ayahs.arabic: إِنِّىٓ ءَامَنتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ فَٱسْمَعُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Innee amantu birabbikum faismaAAooni

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, I have believed in your Lord, so listen to me."
translations.en_yusufali: "For me, I have faith in the Lord of you (all): listen, then, to me!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya aku telah beriman kepada Tuhan kamu, maka dengarlah (nasihatku)",.

ayahs.arabic: قِيلَ ٱدْخُلِ ٱلْجَنَّةَ ۖ قَالَ يَـٰلَيْتَ قَوْمِى يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qeela odkhuli aljannata qala ya layta qawmee yaAAlamoona

translations.en_sahih: It was said, "Enter Paradise." He said, "I wish my people could know
translations.en_yusufali: It was said: "Enter thou the Garden." He said: "Ah me! Would that my People knew (what I know)!-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah ia mati) lalu dikatakan kepadanya: "Masuklah ke dalam Syurga". Ia berkata; "Alangkah baiknya kalau kaumku mengetahui -

ayahs.arabic: بِمَا غَفَرَ لِى رَبِّى وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Bima ghafara lee rabbee wajaAAalanee mina almukrameena

translations.en_sahih: Of how my Lord has forgiven me and placed me among the honored."
translations.en_yusufali: "For that my Lord has granted me Forgiveness and has enrolled me among those held in honour!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Tentang perkara yang menyebabkan daku diampunkan oleh Tuhanku, serta dijadikannya daku dari orang-orang yang dimuliakan".

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَمَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ مِن جُندٍ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا كُنَّا مُنزِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama anzalna AAala qawmihi min baAAdihi min jundin mina alssamai wama kunna munzileena

translations.en_sahih: And We did not send down upon his people after him any soldiers from the heaven, nor would We have done so.
translations.en_yusufali: And We sent not down against his People, after him, any hosts from heaven, nor was it needful for Us so to do.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami tidak menurunkan kepada kaumnya sesudah ia (mati) sebarang pasukan tentera dari langit (untuk membinasakan mereka), dan tidak perlu Kami menurunkannya.

ayahs.arabic: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ خَـٰمِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: In kanat illa sayhatan wahidatan faitha hum khamidoona

translations.en_sahih: It was not but one shout, and immediately they were extinguished.
translations.en_yusufali: It was no more than a single mighty Blast, and behold! they were (like ashes) quenched and silent.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kebinasaan mereka) hanyalah dilakukan dengan satu pekikan (yang dahsyat), maka dengan serta merta mereka semua sunyi-sepi tidak hidup lagi.

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى ٱلْعِبَادِ ۚ مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ya hasratan AAala alAAibadi ma yateehim min rasoolin illa kanoo bihi yastahzioona

translations.en_sahih: How regretful for the servants. There did not come to them any messenger except that they used to ridicule him.
translations.en_yusufali: Ah! Alas for (My) Servants! There comes not a messenger to them but they mock him!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sungguh besar perasaan sesal dan kecewa yang menimpa hamba-hamba (yang mengingkari kebenaran)! Tidak datang kepada mereka seorang Rasul melainkan mereka mengejek-ejek dan memperolok-olokkannya.

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Alam yaraw kam ahlakna qablahum mina alqurooni annahum ilayhim la yarjiAAoona

translations.en_sahih: Have they not considered how many generations We destroyed before them - that they to them will not return?
translations.en_yusufali: See they not how many generations before them we destroyed? Not to them will they return:
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidakkah mereka mengetahui berapa banyak umat-umat yang telah Kami binasakan sebelum mereka? Umat-umat yang telah binasa itu tidak kembali lagi kepada mereka (bahkan kembali kepada Kami, untuk menerima balasan).

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن كُلٌّ لَّمَّا جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wain kullun lamma jameeAAun ladayna muhdaroona

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, all of them will yet be brought present before Us.
translations.en_yusufali: But each one of them all - will be brought before Us (for judgment).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tidak ada satu makhluk pun melainkan dihimpunkan ke tempat perbicaraan Kami, semuanya dibawa hadir (untuk menerima balasan).

ayahs.arabic: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَرْضُ ٱلْمَيْتَةُ أَحْيَيْنَـٰهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّا فَمِنْهُ يَأْكُلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waayatun lahumu alardu almaytatu ahyaynaha waakhrajna minha habban faminhu yakuloona

translations.en_sahih: And a sign for them is the dead earth. We have brought it to life and brought forth from it grain, and from it they eat.
translations.en_yusufali: A Sign for them is the earth that is dead: We do give it life, and produce grain therefrom, of which ye do eat.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan dalil yang terang untuk mereka (memahami kekuasaan dan kemurahan kami), ialah bumi yang mati; kami hidupkan dia serta kami keluarkan daripadanya biji-bijian, maka daripada biji-bijian itu mereka makan.

ayahs.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا جَنَّـٰتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنَـٰبٍ وَفَجَّرْنَا فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْعُيُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: WajaAAalna feeha jannatin min nakheelin waaAAnabin wafajjarna feeha mina alAAuyooni

translations.en_sahih: And We placed therein gardens of palm trees and grapevines and caused to burst forth therefrom some springs -
translations.en_yusufali: And We produce therein orchard with date-palms and vines, and We cause springs to gush forth therein:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kami jadikan di bumi itu kebun-kebun kurma dan anggur, dan kami pancarkan padanya beberapa matair,

ayahs.arabic: لِيَأْكُلُوا۟ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتْهُ أَيْدِيهِمْ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Liyakuloo min thamarihi wama AAamilathu aydeehim afala yashkuroona

translations.en_sahih: That they may eat of His fruit. And their hands have not produced it, so will they not be grateful?
translations.en_yusufali: That they may enjoy the fruits of this (artistry): It was not their hands that made this: will they not then give thanks?
translations.ms_basmeih: Supaya mereka makan dari buah-buahannya dan dari apa yang dikerjakan oleh tangan mereka; maka patutkah mereka tidak bersyukur?

ayahs.arabic: سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوَٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Subhana allathee khalaqa alazwaja kullaha mimma tunbitu alardu wamin anfusihim wamimma la yaAAlamoona

translations.en_sahih: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know.
translations.en_yusufali: Glory to Allah, Who created in pairs all things that the earth produces, as well as their own (human) kind and (other) things of which they have no knowledge.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maha Suci Tuhan yang telah menciptakan makhluk-makhluk semuanya berpasangan; sama ada dari yang ditumbuhkan oleh bumi, atau dari diri mereka, ataupun dari apa yang mereka tidak mengetahuinya.

ayahs.arabic: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلَّيْلُ نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظْلِمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waayatun lahumu allaylu naslakhu minhu alnnahara faitha hum muthlimoona

translations.en_sahih: And a sign for them is the night. We remove from it [the light of] day, so they are [left] in darkness.
translations.en_yusufali: And a Sign for them is the Night: We withdraw therefrom the Day, and behold they are plunged in darkness;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan lagi dalil yang terang untuk mereka (berfikir) ialah malam; Kami hilangkan siang daripadanya, maka dengan serta-merta mereka berada dalam gelap-gelita;

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلشَّمْسُ تَجْرِى لِمُسْتَقَرٍّ لَّهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْعَلِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waalshshamsu tajree limustaqarrin laha thalika taqdeeru alAAazeezi alAAaleemi

translations.en_sahih: And the sun runs [on course] toward its stopping point. That is the determination of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.
translations.en_yusufali: And the sun runs his course for a period determined for him: that is the decree of (Him), the Exalted in Might, the All-Knowing.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (sebahagian dari dalil yang tersebut ialah) matahari; ia kelihatan beredar ke tempat yang ditetapkan baginya; itu adalah takdir Tuhan yang Maha Kuasa, lagi Maha Mengetahui;

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْقَمَرَ قَدَّرْنَـٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلْعُرْجُونِ ٱلْقَدِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waalqamara qaddarnahu manazila hatta AAada kaalAAurjooni alqadeemi

translations.en_sahih: And the moon - We have determined for it phases, until it returns [appearing] like the old date stalk.
translations.en_yusufali: And the Moon,- We have measured for her mansions (to traverse) till she returns like the old (and withered) lower part of a date-stalk.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bulan pula Kami takdirkan dia beredar melalui beberapa peringkat, sehingga di akhir peredarannya kelihatan kembalinya pula ke peringkat awalnya - (berbentuk melengkung) seperti tandan yang kering.

ayahs.arabic: لَا ٱلشَّمْسُ يَنۢبَغِى لَهَآ أَن تُدْرِكَ ٱلْقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيْلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِ ۚ وَكُلٌّ فِى فَلَكٍ يَسْبَحُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: La alshshamsu yanbaghee laha an tudrika alqamara wala allaylu sabiqu alnnahari wakullun fee falakin yasbahoona

translations.en_sahih: It is not allowable for the sun to reach the moon, nor does the night overtake the day, but each, in an orbit, is swimming.
translations.en_yusufali: It is not permitted to the Sun to catch up the Moon, nor can the Night outstrip the Day: Each (just) swims along in (its own) orbit (according to Law).
translations.ms_basmeih: (Dengan ketentuan yang demikian), matahari tidak mudah baginya mengejar bulan, dan malam pula tidak dapat mendahului siang; kerana tiap-tiap satunya beredar terapung-apung di tempat edarannya masing-masing.

ayahs.arabic: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمْ أَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waayatun lahum anna hamalna thurriyyatahum fee alfulki almashhooni

translations.en_sahih: And a sign for them is that We carried their forefathers in a laden ship.
translations.en_yusufali: And a Sign for them is that We bore their race (through the Flood) in the loaded Ark;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan satu dalil lagi untuk mereka (insaf) ialah, Kami membawa belayar jenis keluarga mereka dalam bahtera yang penuh sarat;

ayahs.arabic: وَخَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ مَا يَرْكَبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wakhalaqna lahum min mithlihi ma yarkaboona

translations.en_sahih: And We created for them from the likes of it that which they ride.
translations.en_yusufali: And We have created for them similar (vessels) on which they ride.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami ciptakan untuk mereka, jenis-jenis kenderaan yang sama dengannya, yang mereka dapat mengenderainya.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن نَّشَأْ نُغْرِقْهُمْ فَلَا صَرِيخَ لَهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُنقَذُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wain nasha nughriqhum fala sareekha lahum wala hum yunqathoona

translations.en_sahih: And if We should will, We could drown them; then no one responding to a cry would there be for them, nor would they be saved
translations.en_yusufali: If it were Our Will, We could drown them: then would there be no helper (to hear their cry), nor could they be delivered,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan jika kami kehendaki, kami boleh tenggelamkan mereka; (kiranya Kami lakukan yang demikian) maka tidak ada yang dapat memberi pertolongan kepada mereka, dan mereka juga tidak dapat diselamatkan, -

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا رَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَمَتَـٰعًا إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa rahmatan minna wamataAAan ila heenin

translations.en_sahih: Except as a mercy from Us and provision for a time.
translations.en_yusufali: Except by way of Mercy from Us, and by way of (world) convenience (to serve them) for a time.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali dengan kemurahan dari pihak Kami memberi rahmat dan kesenangan hidup kepada mereka hingga ke suatu masa.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱتَّقُوا۟ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيكُمْ وَمَا خَلْفَكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waitha qeela lahumu ittaqoo ma bayna aydeekum wama khalfakum laAAallakum turhamoona

translations.en_sahih: But when it is said to them, "Beware of what is before you and what is behind you; perhaps you will receive mercy... "
translations.en_yusufali: When they are told, "Fear ye that which is before you and that which will be after you, in order that ye may receive Mercy," (they turn back).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila dikatakan kepada mereka: " berjaga-jagalah kamu akan apa yang ada di hadapan kamu (dari urusan-urusan hidup di dunia ini), dan apa yang ada di belakang kamu (dari huru-hara dan balasan akhirat), supaya kamu beroleh rahmat", (mereka tidak mengindahkannya).

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا تَأْتِيهِم مِّنْ ءَايَةٍ مِّنْ ءَايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama tateehim min ayatin min ayati rabbihim illa kanoo AAanha muAArideena

translations.en_sahih: And no sign comes to them from the signs of their Lord except that they are from it turning away.
translations.en_yusufali: Not a Sign comes to them from among the Signs of their Lord, but they turn away therefrom.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (itulah tabiat mereka) tidak ada sesuatu keterangan yang sampai kepada mereka dari keterangan-keterangan tuhan mereka melainkan mereka selalu berpaling daripadanya (enggan menerimanya).

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَنُطْعِمُ مَن لَّوْ يَشَآءُ ٱللَّهُ أَطْعَمَهُۥٓ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Waitha qeela lahum anfiqoo mimma razaqakumu Allahu qala allatheena kafaroo lillatheena amanoo anutAAimu man law yashao Allahu atAAamahu in antum illa fee dalalin mubeenin

translations.en_sahih: And when it is said to them, "Spend from that which Allah has provided for you," those who disbelieve say to those who believe, "Should we feed one whom, if Allah had willed, He would have fed? You are not but in clear error."
translations.en_yusufali: And when they are told, "Spend ye of (the bounties) with which Allah has provided you," the Unbelievers say to those who believe: "Shall we then feed those whom, if Allah had so willed, He would have fed, (Himself)?- Ye are in nothing but manifest error."
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila dikatakan kepada mereka:" Dermakanlah sebahagian dari rezeki yang dikurniakan Allah kepada kamu", berkatalah orang-orang yang kafir itu kepada orang-orang yang beriman (secara mengejek-ejek): " Patutkah kami memberi makan kepada orang yang jika Allah kehendaki tentulah Ia akan memberinya makan? Kamu ini hanyalah berada dalam kesesatan yang nyata".

ayahs.arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena

translations.en_sahih: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
translations.en_yusufali: Further, they say, "When will this promise (come to pass), if what ye say is true?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (apabila mereka diingatkan tentang huru-hara dan balasan akhirat) mereka bertanya (secara mempersenda): " Bilakah datangnya (hari akhirat) yang dijanjikan itu? Jika betul kamu orang-orang yang benar (maka kami sedia menunggu)!",

ayahs.arabic: مَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً تَأْخُذُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَخِصِّمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma yanthuroona illa sayhatan wahidatan takhuthuhum wahum yakhissimoona

translations.en_sahih: They do not await except one blast which will seize them while they are disputing.
translations.en_yusufali: They will not (have to) wait for aught but a single Blast: it will seize them while they are yet disputing among themselves!
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka tidak menunggu melainkan satu pekikan yang - (dengan secara mengejut) akan membinasakan mereka semasa mereka dalam keadaan leka bertengkar (merundingkan urusan dunia masing-masing).

ayahs.arabic: فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ تَوْصِيَةً وَلَآ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fala yastateeAAoona tawsiyatan wala ila ahlihim yarjiAAoona

translations.en_sahih: And they will not be able [to give] any instruction, nor to their people can they return.
translations.en_yusufali: No (chance) will they then have, by will, to dispose (of their affairs), nor to return to their own people!
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka dengan itu, mereka tidak berpeluang membuat sebarang pesanan (wasiat atau lainnya), dan (kalau mereka berada di luar) mereka tidak sempat kembali kepada keluarganya.

ayahs.arabic: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَنسِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wanufikha fee alssoori faitha hum mina alajdathi ila rabbihim yansiloona

translations.en_sahih: And the Horn will be blown; and at once from the graves to their Lord they will hasten.
translations.en_yusufali: The trumpet shall be sounded, when behold! from the sepulchres (men) will rush forth to their Lord!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sudah tentu akan ditiupkan sangkakala (menghidupkan orang-orang yang telah mati; apabila berlaku yang demikian) maka semuanya segera bangkit keluar dari kubur masing-masing (untuk) mengadap Tuhannya.

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَا مَنۢ بَعَثَنَا مِن مَّرْقَدِنَا ۜ ۗ هَـٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَصَدَقَ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo ya waylana man baAAathana min marqadina hatha ma waAAada alrrahmanu wasadaqa almursaloona

translations.en_sahih: They will say, "O woe to us! Who has raised us up from our sleeping place?" [The reply will be], "This is what the Most Merciful had promised, and the messengers told the truth."
translations.en_yusufali: They will say: "Ah! Woe unto us! Who hath raised us up from our beds of repose?"... (A voice will say:) "This is what (Allah) Most Gracious had promised. And true was the word of the messengers!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Pada ketika itu) orang-orang yang tidak percayakan hidup semula berkata: Aduhai celakanya kami! Siapakah yang membangkitkan kami dari kubur tempat tidur kami?,, (Lalu dikatakan kepada mereka): " Inilah dia yang telah dijanjikan oleh Allah Yang Maha Pemurah dan benarlah berita yang disampaikan oleh Rasul-rasul!,

ayahs.arabic: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: In kanat illa sayhatan wahidatan faitha hum jameeAAun ladayna muhdaroona

translations.en_sahih: It will not be but one blast, and at once they are all brought present before Us.
translations.en_yusufali: It will be no more than a single Blast, when lo! they will all be brought up before Us!
translations.ms_basmeih: Hanyalah dengan berlakunya satu pekikan sahaja, maka dengan serta merta mereka dihimpunkan ke tempat perbicaraan Kami, semuanya dibawa hadir (untuk menerima balasan).

ayahs.arabic: فَٱلْيَوْمَ لَا تُظْلَمُ نَفْسٌ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faalyawma la tuthlamu nafsun shayan wala tujzawna illa ma kuntum taAAmaloona

translations.en_sahih: So today no soul will be wronged at all, and you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do.
translations.en_yusufali: Then, on that Day, not a soul will be wronged in the least, and ye shall but be repaid the meeds of your past Deeds.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka pada hari itu, tidak ada seseorang yang akan dianiaya sedikitpun, dan kamu pula tidak akan dibalas melainkan menurut amal yang kamu telah kerjakan.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ٱلْيَوْمَ فِى شُغُلٍ فَـٰكِهُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna ashaba aljannati alyawma fee shughulin fakihoona

translations.en_sahih: Indeed the companions of Paradise, that Day, will be amused in [joyful] occupation -
translations.en_yusufali: Verily the Companions of the Garden shall that Day have joy in all that they do;
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya penduduk Syurga pada hari itu, berada dalam keadaan sibuk leka menikmati kesenangan;

ayahs.arabic: هُمْ وَأَزْوَٰجُهُمْ فِى ظِلَـٰلٍ عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ مُتَّكِـُٔونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hum waazwajuhum fee thilalin AAala alaraiki muttakioona

translations.en_sahih: They and their spouses - in shade, reclining on adorned couches.
translations.en_yusufali: They and their associates will be in groves of (cool) shade, reclining on Thrones (of dignity);
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka dengan pasangan-pasangan mereka bersukaria di tempat yang teduh, sambil duduk berbaring di atas pelamin;

ayahs.arabic: لَهُمْ فِيهَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَلَهُم مَّا يَدَّعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Lahum feeha fakihatun walahum ma yaddaAAoona

translations.en_sahih: For them therein is fruit, and for them is whatever they request [or wish]
translations.en_yusufali: (Every) fruit (enjoyment) will be there for them; they shall have whatever they call for;
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka beroleh dalam Syurga itu pelbagai jenis buah-buahan, dan mereka beroleh apa sahaja yang mereka kehendaki;

ayahs.arabic: سَلَـٰمٌ قَوْلًا مِّن رَّبٍّ رَّحِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Salamun qawlan min rabbin raheemin

translations.en_sahih: [And] "Peace," a word from a Merciful Lord.
translations.en_yusufali: "Peace!" - a word (of salutation) from a Lord Most Merciful!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mereka juga beroleh) ucapan salam sejahtera dari Tuhan Yang Maha Mengasihani.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱمْتَـٰزُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waimtazoo alyawma ayyuha almujrimoona

translations.en_sahih: [Then He will say], "But stand apart today, you criminals.
translations.en_yusufali: "And O ye in sin! Get ye apart this Day!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (sebaliknya dikatakan kepada orang-orang yang kafir): "Berpisahlah kamu pada hari ini, hai orang-orang yang berdosa, (dari bercampur gaul dengan orang-orang yang beriman).

ayahs.arabic: ۞ أَلَمْ أَعْهَدْ إِلَيْكُمْ يَـٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ أَن لَّا تَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Alam aAAhad ilaykum ya banee adama an la taAAbudoo alshshaytana innahu lakum AAaduwwun mubeenun

translations.en_sahih: Did I not enjoin upon you, O children of Adam, that you not worship Satan - [for] indeed, he is to you a clear enemy -
translations.en_yusufali: "Did I not enjoin on you, O ye Children of Adam, that ye should not worship Satan; for that he was to you an enemy avowed?-
translations.ms_basmeih: "Bukankah Aku telah perintahkan kamu wahai anak-anak Adam, supaya kamu jangan menyembah Syaitan? Sesungguhnya ia musuh yang nyata terhadap kamu!

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنِ ٱعْبُدُونِى ۚ هَـٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ مُّسْتَقِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Waani oAAbudoonee hatha siratun mustaqeemun

translations.en_sahih: And that you worship [only] Me? This is a straight path.
translations.en_yusufali: "And that ye should worship Me, (for that) this was the Straight Way?
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan (Aku perintahkan): hendaklah kamu menyembahKu; inilah jalan yang lurus.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَضَلَّ مِنكُمْ جِبِلًّا كَثِيرًا ۖ أَفَلَمْ تَكُونُوا۟ تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad adalla minkum jibillan katheeran afalam takoonoo taAAqiloona

translations.en_sahih: And he had already led astray from among you much of creation, so did you not use reason?
translations.en_yusufali: "But he did lead astray a great multitude of you. Did ye not, then, understand?
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan sesungguhnya Syaitan itu telah menyesatkan golongan yang ramai di antara kamu; (setelah kamu mengetahui akibat mereka) maka tidakkah sepatutnya kamu berfikir dan insaf?

ayahs.arabic: هَـٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُمْ تُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hathihi jahannamu allatee kuntum tooAAadoona

translations.en_sahih: This is the Hellfire which you were promised.
translations.en_yusufali: "This is the Hell of which ye were (repeatedly) warned!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Yang kamu saksikan sekarang ialah neraka Jahannam, yang kamu selalu diancam memasukinya (kalau kamu tidak taatkan perintah Allah).

ayahs.arabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْفُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Islawha alyawma bima kuntum takfuroona

translations.en_sahih: [Enter to] burn therein today for what you used to deny."
translations.en_yusufali: "Embrace ye the (fire) this Day, for that ye (persistently) rejected (Truth)."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Rasalah kamu bakarannya pada hari ini, disebabkan perbuatan kufur yang kamu telah lakukan!"

ayahs.arabic: ٱلْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفْوَٰهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Alyawma nakhtimu AAala afwahihim watukallimuna aydeehim watashhadu arjuluhum bima kanoo yaksiboona

translations.en_sahih: That Day, We will seal over their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify about what they used to earn.
translations.en_yusufali: That Day shall We set a seal on their mouths. But their hands will speak to us, and their feet bear witness, to all that they did.
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada waktu itu Kami meteraikan mulut mereka (sejurus); dan (memberi peluang kepada) tangan-tangan mereka memberitahu Kami (kesalahan masing-masing), dan kaki mereka pula menjadi saksi tentang apa yang mereka telah usahakan.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَىٰٓ أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَٱسْتَبَقُوا۟ ٱلصِّرَٰطَ فَأَنَّىٰ يُبْصِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaw nashao latamasna AAala aAAyunihim faistabaqoo alssirata faanna yubsiroona

translations.en_sahih: And if We willed, We could have obliterated their eyes, and they would race to [find] the path, and how could they see?
translations.en_yusufali: If it had been our Will, We could surely have blotted out their eyes; then should they have run about groping for the Path, but how could they have seen?
translations.ms_basmeih: (Matahati orang-orang yang menderhaka itu rosak) dan kalau Kami kehendaki, Kami berkuasa menghapuskan bentuk dan biji mata kepala mereka menjadi rata, sehingga masing-masing menerpa mencari-cari jalan (yang biasa mereka lalui). (Kiranya dijadikan demikian) maka bagaimanakah mereka dapat melihatnya?

ayahs.arabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخْنَـٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaw nashao lamasakhnahum AAala makanatihim fama istataAAoo mudiyyan wala yarjiAAoona

translations.en_sahih: And if We willed, We could have deformed them, [paralyzing them] in their places so they would not be able to proceed, nor could they return.
translations.en_yusufali: And if it had been Our Will, We could have transformed them (to remain) in their places; then should they have been unable to move about, nor could they have returned (after error).
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kekuatan akal fikiran mereka juga tidak sihat) dan kalau kami kehendaki, kami berkuasa mangubahkan keadaan jasmani mereka (menjadi kaku beku) di tempat yang mereka berada padanya; maka dengan itu, mereka tidak dapat mara ke hadapan dan juga tidak dapat undur ke belakang.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نُنَكِّسْهُ فِى ٱلْخَلْقِ ۖ أَفَلَا يَعْقِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waman nuAAammirhu nunakkishu fee alkhalqi afala yaAAqiloona

translations.en_sahih: And he to whom We grant long life We reverse in creation; so will they not understand?
translations.en_yusufali: If We grant long life to any, We cause him to be reversed in nature: Will they not then understand?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (hendaklah diingat bahawa) sesiapa yang Kami panjangkan umurnya, Kami balikkan kembali kejadiannya (kepada keadaan serba lemah; hakikat ini memang jelas) maka mengapa mereka tidak mahu memikirkannya?

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا عَلَّمْنَـٰهُ ٱلشِّعْرَ وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُۥٓ ۚ إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ وَقُرْءَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama AAallamnahu alshshiAAra wama yanbaghee lahu in huwa illa thikrun waquranun mubeenun

translations.en_sahih: And We did not give Prophet Muhammad, knowledge of poetry, nor is it befitting for him. It is not but a message and a clear Qur'an
translations.en_yusufali: We have not instructed the (Prophet) in Poetry, nor is it meet for him: this is no less than a Message and a Qur'an making things clear:
translations.ms_basmeih: (Nabi Muhammad bukanlah penyair) dan Kami tidak mengajarkan syair kepadanya, dan kepandaian bersyair itu pula tidak sesuai baginya. Yang Kami wahyukan kepadanya itu tidak lain melainkan nasihat pengajaran dan Kitab Suci yang memberi penerangan;

ayahs.arabic: لِّيُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيًّا وَيَحِقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Liyunthira man kana hayyan wayahiqqa alqawlu AAala alkafireena

translations.en_sahih: To warn whoever is alive and justify the word against the disbelievers.
translations.en_yusufali: That it may give admonition to any (who are) alive, and that the charge may be proved against those who reject (Truth).
translations.ms_basmeih: Supaya ia memberi peringatan kepada orang yang sedia hidup (hatinya), dan supaya nyata tetapnya hukuman (azab) terhadap orang-orang yang kufur ingkar.

ayahs.arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعَـٰمًا فَهُمْ لَهَا مَـٰلِكُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Awalam yaraw anna khalaqna lahum mimma AAamilat aydeena anAAaman fahum laha malikoona

translations.en_sahih: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners?
translations.en_yusufali: See they not that it is We Who have created for them - among the things which Our hands have fashioned - cattle, which are under their dominion?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidakkah mereka melihat dan memikirkan, bahawa Kami telah menciptakan untuk mereka binatang-binatang ternak, di antara jenis-jenis makhluk yang telah Kami ciptakan dengan kekuasaan Kami lalu mereka memilikinya?

ayahs.arabic: وَذَلَّلْنَـٰهَا لَهُمْ فَمِنْهَا رَكُوبُهُمْ وَمِنْهَا يَأْكُلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wathallalnaha lahum faminha rakoobuhum waminha yakuloona

translations.en_sahih: And We have tamed them for them, so some of them they ride, and some of them they eat.
translations.en_yusufali: And that We have subjected them to their (use)? of them some do carry them and some they eat:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami jinakkan dia untuk kegunaan mereka; maka sebahagian di antaranya menjadi kenderaan mereka, dan sebahagian lagi mereka makan.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَهُمْ فِيهَا مَنَـٰفِعُ وَمَشَارِبُ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walahum feeha manafiAAu wamasharibu afala yashkuroona

translations.en_sahih: And for them therein are [other] benefits and drinks, so will they not be grateful?
translations.en_yusufali: And they have (other) profits from them (besides), and they get (milk) to drink. Will they not then be grateful?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka beroleh berbagai faedah dan kegunaan pada binatang ternak itu dan juga beroleh minuman; maka mengapa mereka tidak mahu bersyukur?

ayahs.arabic: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لَّعَلَّهُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waittakhathoo min dooni Allahi alihatan laAAallahum yunsaroona

translations.en_sahih: But they have taken besides Allah [false] deities that perhaps they would be helped.
translations.en_yusufali: Yet they take (for worship) gods other than Allah, (hoping) that they might be helped!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tergamak mereka menyembah beberapa tuhan yang lain dari Allah, (dengan harapan semoga mereka mendapat pertolongan (dari makhluk-makhluk itu).

ayahs.arabic: لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَهُمْ جُندٌ مُّحْضَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: La yastateeAAoona nasrahum wahum lahum jundun muhdaroona

translations.en_sahih: They are not able to help them, and they [themselves] are for them soldiers in attendance.
translations.en_yusufali: They have not the power to help them: but they will be brought up (before Our Judgment-seat) as a troop (to be condemned).
translations.ms_basmeih: Benda-benda yang mereka sembah itu tidak dapat sama sekali menolong mereka, sedang benda-benda itu sendiri menjadi tentera yang akan dibawa hadir (pada hari kiamat, untuk memberi azab seksa) kepada mereka.

ayahs.arabic: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ ۘ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fala yahzunka qawluhum inna naAAlamu ma yusirroona wama yuAAlinoona

translations.en_sahih: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare.
translations.en_yusufali: Let not their speech, then, grieve thee. Verily We know what they hide as well as what they disclose.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka janganlah engkau (wahai Muhammad) berdukacita disebabkan tuduhan-tuduhan mereka (terhadapmu). Sesungguhnya Kami sedia mengetahui apa yang mereka sembunyikan dan apa yang mereka nyatakan.

ayahs.arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Awalam yara alinsanu anna khalaqnahu min nutfatin faitha huwa khaseemun mubeenun

translations.en_sahih: Does man not consider that We created him from a [mere] sperm-drop - then at once he is a clear adversary?
translations.en_yusufali: Doth not man see that it is We Who created him from sperm? yet behold! he (stands forth) as an open adversary!
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidakkah manusia itu melihat dan mengetahui, bahawa Kami telah menciptakan dia dari (setitis) air benih? Dalam pada itu (setelah Kami sempurnakan kejadiannya dan tenaga kekuatannya) maka dengan tidak semena-mena menjadilah ia seorang pembantah yang terang jelas bantahannya (mengenai kekuasaan Kami menghidupkan semula orang-orang yang mati),

ayahs.arabic: وَضَرَبَ لَنَا مَثَلًا وَنَسِىَ خَلْقَهُۥ ۖ قَالَ مَن يُحْىِ ٱلْعِظَـٰمَ وَهِىَ رَمِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wadaraba lana mathalan wanasiya khalqahu qala man yuhyee alAAithama wahiya rameemun

translations.en_sahih: And he presents for Us an example and forgets his [own] creation. He says, "Who will give life to bones while they are disintegrated?"
translations.en_yusufali: And he makes comparisons for Us, and forgets his own (origin and) Creation: He says, "Who can give life to (dry) bones and decomposed ones (at that)?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta ia mengemukakan satu misal perbandingan kepada Kami (tentang kekuasaan itu), dan ia pula lupakan keadaan Kami menciptakannya sambil ia bertanya: "Siapakah yang dapat menghidupkan tulang-tulang yang telah hancur seperti debu?"

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ يُحْيِيهَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَهَآ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلْقٍ عَلِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Qul yuhyeeha allathee anshaaha awwala marratin wahuwa bikulli khalqin AAaleemun

translations.en_sahih: Say, "He will give them life who produced them the first time; and He is, of all creation, Knowing."
translations.en_yusufali: Say, "He will give them life Who created them for the first time! for He is Well-versed in every kind of creation!-
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah: "Tulang-tulang yang hancur itu akan dihidupkan oleh Tuhan yang telah menciptakannya pada awal mula wujudnya; dan Ia Maha Mengetahui akan segala keadaan makhluk-makhluk (yang diciptakanNya);

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّجَرِ ٱلْأَخْضَرِ نَارًا فَإِذَآ أَنتُم مِّنْهُ تُوقِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Allathee jaAAala lakum mina alshshajari alakhdari naran faitha antum minhu tooqidoona

translations.en_sahih: [It is] He who made for you from the green tree, fire, and then from it you ignite.
translations.en_yusufali: "The same Who produces for you fire out of the green tree, when behold! ye kindle therewith (your own fires)!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Tuhan yang telah menjadikan api (boleh didapati) dari pohon-pohon yang hijau basah untuk kegunaan kamu, maka kamu pun selalu menyalakan api dari pohon-pohon itu".

ayahs.arabic: أَوَلَيْسَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِقَـٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يَخْلُقَ مِثْلَهُم ۚ بَلَىٰ وَهُوَ ٱلْخَلَّـٰقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahs.transliteration: Awalaysa allathee khalaqa alssamawati waalarda biqadirin AAala an yakhluqa mithlahum bala wahuwa alkhallaqu alAAaleemu

translations.en_sahih: Is not He who created the heavens and the earth Able to create the likes of them? Yes, [it is so]; and He is the Knowing Creator.
translations.en_yusufali: "Is not He Who created the heavens and the earth able to create the like thereof?" - Yea, indeed! for He is the Creator Supreme, of skill and knowledge (infinite)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidakkah diakui dan tidakkah dipercayai bahawa Tuhan yang telah menciptakan langit dan bumi (yang demikian besarnya) - berkuasa menciptakan semula manusia sebagaimana Ia menciptakan mereka dahulu? Ya! Diakui dan dipercayai berkuasa! Dan Dia lah Pencipta yang tidak ada bandinganNya, lagi Yang Maha Mengetahui.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّمَآ أَمْرُهُۥٓ إِذَآ أَرَادَ شَيْـًٔا أَن يَقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
ayahs.transliteration: Innama amruhu itha arada shayan an yaqoola lahu kun fayakoonu

translations.en_sahih: His command is only when He intends a thing that He says to it, "Be," and it is.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily, when He intends a thing, His Command is, "be", and it is!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya keadaan kekuasaanNya apabila Ia menghendaki adanya sesuatu, hanyalah Ia berfirman kepada (hakikat) benda itu: " Jadilah engkau! ". Maka ia terus menjadi.

ayahs.arabic: فَسُبْحَـٰنَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fasubhana allathee biyadihi malakootu kulli shayin wailayhi turjaAAoona

translations.en_sahih: So exalted is He in whose hand is the realm of all things, and to Him you will be returned.
translations.en_yusufali: So glory to Him in Whose hands is the dominion of all things: and to Him will ye be all brought back.
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu akuilah kesucian Allah (dengan mengucap: Subhaanallah!) - Tuhan yang memiliki dan menguasai tiap-tiap sesuatu, dan kepadaNyalah kamu semua dikembalikan.
